a.xlink:title: Export macros, compiler attributes and version constants shared by every Tactix module.
Read-only, side-effect-free snapshot of one agent for a single decision.
Min-heap tick distributor that spreads agent work across frames under a per-frame CPU budget.
The engine-agnostic contract a "thinking" entity implements to take part in Tactix systems.
Stimulus record and channel interface for the perception memory.
Per-agent ring buffer of timestamped stimuli with on-demand decay.
A single piece of cover: where to stand, which way it faces, and who currently owns it.
Registry of cover points with claim/release ownership and a "best cover for this situation" que...
Fixed-capacity squad: a roster of agent handles with roles, slots, a leader and a current tactic.
Typed key-value store with compile-time key hashing: the AI systems' shared working memory.
Bump (linear) allocator for short-lived scratch memory.
Response curves that turn a raw input into a normalised utility score.
The standard consideration: pull one number out of the context, run it through a response curve.
Lightweight typed event channel with no heap traffic per publish.
Engine-agnostic 2D grid with world<->cell coordinate conversion.
Type-safe generational handle: the only sanctioned way to reference a pooled object across frames.
Fixed-capacity pool allocator with per-slot generation tracking.
Small, engine-agnostic vector and scalar math used across Tactix.
Multi-channel 2D scalar field for spatial reasoning (danger, control, resource, .....

Unreal-facing entry point for the TactixCore module: the shared log category and the module lifecycle...
A* planner over the GOAP world-state graph.
Symbolic world state for the GOAP planner: 64 boolean facts plus a "defined" mask.
Interface for a GOAP action: a graph edge with preconditions, effects and a cost.
Depth-first HTN planner with method-order fallback and backtracking.
Task hierarchy for the HTN planner: the common base, primitive (leaf) tasks, and compound tasks that ...
Picks the highest-scoring action, and computes a combined consideration score with compensation for t...
Interface for a Utility AI action: a thing the agent can choose to do, with a score and an execution ...
Interface for a single Utility AI consideration: one normalised factor in an action's overall score.
Static helpers that draw per-agent debug overlays in the world.
The component that makes a pawn a Tactix agent.
Designer-facing asset: a named set of scored actions for one decision context.
Implements the agent debug overlays with debug-draw primitives.
Implements step-by-step plan execution for the BT task.
Implements utility scoring: input extraction, curve building, and the Lewis-compensated action score.

Per-agent timing recorder for spotting which agents and which phases cost the most.
Ring buffer of recent AI decisions for replay scrubbing and post-mortems ("why did it do that?...
Implements the timing profiler: cycle-counter sampling, ring storage, and the aggregate queries.
Implements the decision ring buffer: recording, history/all queries, and the log dump.
Per-world owner of the cover system and influence map shared by every agent in the level.
A* implementation for Tactix::FTactixGOAPPlanner.
Recursive decomposition for Tactix::FTactixHTNPlanner.
Base AIController for Tactix-aware pawns.
Draws an influence-map channel as a world-space heat grid.
Implements the TactixCore module object and defines the shared log category for the whole plugin.
Implements the TactixDebug module: registering and removing the Gameplay Debugger category.
Implements the TactixSystems module lifecycle (logging only).
Implements the TactixUE module lifecycle (logging only).
